paper_title: Sediment and Pore Water Analysis on Vestnesa Ridge

methods.description: Collection and preparation of sediment samples from Vestnesa Ridge for various analyses, including foraminifera study, pore water, methane, and microbial activity.

steps.description: Sediment samples were collected from a pockmark on Vestnesa Ridge using a TV-guided multicorer.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples using TV-guided multicorer

steps.description: Two cores were selected for foraminifera study and subsampled into 1-cm thick slices.
steps.searchable_summary: subsample sediment cores for foraminifera study

steps.description: Samples were stained with Rose Bengal-ethanol solution and kept at +4°C.
steps.searchable_summary: stain sediment samples with Rose Bengal-ethanol

steps.description: A third core was sectioned for sediment pore water analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: section sediment core for pore water analysis

steps.description: A fourth core was sectioned for sediment methane analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: section sediment core for methane analysis

steps.description: A fifth core was subsampled for methane concentration, oxidation, and sulfate reduction.
steps.searchable_summary: subsample sediment core for methane and sulfate analysis

methods.description: Extraction and geochemical analysis of pore water from sediment samples to measure sulfides, alkalinity, sulfate, and methane concentrations.

steps.description: Pore water was extracted using a low-pressure squeezer and filtered through 0.2 μm filters.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and filter pore water from sediment

steps.description: Pore water samples were analyzed for total sulfides, alkalinity, sulfate, and methane concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze pore water for sulfides, alkalinity, sulfate, methane

methods.method_name: Sulfide, Total Alkalinity, and Sulfate Measurements
methods.description: Onboard analysis of pore water samples for sulfide content, total alkalinity, and sulfate concentration using colorimetric and titration methods.

steps.description: Sulfide content was measured by adding zinc acetate, color reagent, and FeCl3 catalyst, then measuring absorbance at 670 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: measure sulfide content in pore water using colorimetric method

steps.description: Total alkalinity was determined by titration with HCl using methyl red and methylene blue as indicators.
steps.searchable_summary: determine total alkalinity by titration

steps.description: Sulfate concentration was determined by ion chromatography.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sulfate concentration using ion chromatography

methods.description: Determination of methane concentrations in sediment cores using gas chromatography.

steps.description: Sediment cores were sectioned at various intervals and sub-samples were transferred into glass vials with NaCl solution.
steps.searchable_summary: section sediment cores and prepare samples for methane analysis

steps.description: Methane concentration in the headspace was determined using a gas chromatograph.
steps.searchable_summary: measure methane concentration using gas chromatography

methods.description: Measurement of microbial methane oxidation rates in sediment samples using radioactive methane tracer.

steps.description: Radioactive methane was injected into mini cores at 1-cm intervals and incubated.
steps.searchable_summary: inject radioactive methane into sediment cores for oxidation rate measurement

steps.description: Sediment cores were sectioned and transferred into vials with sodium hydroxide to stop bacterial activity.
steps.searchable_summary: section sediment cores and stop bacterial activity with sodium hydroxide

steps.description: Methane oxidation rates were determined in the home laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: determine methane oxidation rates in laboratory

methods.description: Measurement of microbial sulfate reduction rates in sediment samples using radioactive sulfate tracer.

steps.description: Radioactive sulfate was injected into mini cores at 1-cm intervals and incubated.
steps.searchable_summary: inject radioactive sulfate into sediment cores for reduction rate measurement

steps.description: Sediment cores were sectioned and transferred into vials with zinc acetate to stop bacterial activity.
steps.searchable_summary: section sediment cores and stop bacterial activity with zinc acetate

steps.description: Sulfate reduction rates were determined in the home laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: determine sulfate reduction rates in laboratory

methods.description: Analysis of foraminifera in sediment samples to determine living and dead individuals using Rose-Bengal staining.

steps.description: Rose-Bengal stained samples were sieved over a 100-µm sieve.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediment samples for foraminifera analysis

steps.description: The >100-µm fraction was examined under microscopy to identify living foraminifera.
steps.searchable_summary: examine sediment fraction under microscope for foraminifera
